request.name: Sarah Jenkins
request.message: We are currently evaluating AI-assisted lead qualification tools to integrate into our Salesforce workflow. We have a budget allocated for Q3 and need to deploy within 30 days.

expected_response.intent: Deploy enterprise AI lead qualification tool integrated with Salesforce within 30 days.

estimated_deal_size.basis: Grounded in enterprise employee size (2,500) and stated Q3 budget allocation.

pain_points: Lack of real-time sales lead triage
expected_response.recommended_next_action: Schedule an executive discovery and architecture review call within 24 hours.
expected_response.sales_summary: High-priority enterprise opportunity led by CTO with confirmed budget, clear timeline, and integration requirements.

request.name: David Chen
request.message: Interested in learning more about your API pricing and capabilities for automatically scoring inbound web leads.

expected_response.intent: Evaluating API capabilities and pricing for automated inbound lead scoring.

estimated_deal_size.basis: Estimated from mid-market company headcount (150) and standard SaaS tier pricing.

expected_response.recommended_next_action: Send product documentation, API specifications, and pricing overview.
expected_response.sales_summary: Mid-market sales operations leader researching automated qualification solutions.

expected_response.intent: Sparse submission with no stated operational need or intent details.

estimated_deal_size.basis: Insufficient data provided to estimate deal size.

expected_response.recommended_next_action: Enroll in automated email nurturing campaign to collect additional business requirements.
expected_response.sales_summary: Low-context inquiry missing key buyer contact details, role, and requirements.
